subcodes.first_line: O servant of God, thy letter was perused. In truth hardship hath become the cause of distress, and the cruelty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی مراسله آنجناب ملاحظه گشت فی الحقیقه عسرت سبب کدورت شده و جفای
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @status of material wealth; wealth and poverty, @effort; striving
